auth_notes: Requires OAuth2 Authorization Code flow. Developers must create an application in the Sage Developer Portal to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret. The redirect URI must be explicitly set to the n8n callback URL.
gotchas: Base URLs are region-specific (e.g., https://api.accounting.sage.com/v3.1/ vs regional variants).
Strict data validation on address and contact fields often causes 400 Bad Request errors.
The API uses complex nested JSON structures for invoice line items and tax breakdowns.
client_must_provide: Production Sage Business Cloud Accounting login credentials
research_notes: The integration requires using the HTTP Request node with OAuth2 credentials. n8n's generic OAuth2 credential type can handle the token exchange and refresh logic. Developers should target the v3.1 API for the most stable experience. Webhooks are supported but require a separate subscription setup via the API.

effort_recommendation.rationale: The integration requires using the HTTP Request node with OAuth2 credentials. n8n's generic OAuth2 credential type can handle the token exchange and refresh logic. Developers should target the v3.1 API for the most stable experience. Webhooks are supported but require a separate subscription setup via the API.
